expected_result: UI displays all fields from login API response accurately

scenario: Verify login behavior when service returns HTTP 500
expected_result: System shows user-friendly error and logs server error during login

scenario: Verify login behavior when service times out after 30s
expected_result: System shows timeout message and allows retry during login

expected_result: System handles parse error without crashing during login

scenario: Verify login behavior when database connection is lost
expected_result: System returns service-unavailable and queues retry during login

scenario: Verify login behavior when service returns HTTP 429 (rate limited)
expected_result: System backs off and retries after delay during login

scenario: Verify login behavior when DNS resolution fails
expected_result: System shows network error and suggests retry during login

scenario: Verify login behavior when SSL certificate is expired
expected_result: System rejects connection securely and alerts admin during login

expected_result: System handles load without degradation for login

expected_result: System rate-limits or throttles gracefully for login

expected_result: System meets response SLA for login

expected_result: System processes or rejects large payloads correctly for login

expected_result: System maintains data consistency and acceptable speed for login

expected_result: System serves requests from DB without crashing for login

scenario: Verify login handles partial save due to mid-operation failure
expected_result: System rolls back partial data and maintains consistency for login

scenario: Verify login handles null value propagation through data pipeline
expected_result: System handles null safely without NullPointerException for login

scenario: Verify login handles character encoding mismatch (UTF-8 vs Latin-1)
expected_result: System preserves data integrity with correct encoding for login

scenario: Verify login handles concurrent write to same record
expected_result: System prevents data loss via locking or versioning for login

scenario: Verify login handles transaction fails after partial commit
expected_result: System rolls back entire transaction atomically for login

scenario: Verify login handles data truncation during insert
expected_result: System rejects or warns about data exceeding column width for login

scenario: Verify login: two users modify same record simultaneously
expected_result: System detects conflict and one update is rejected or merged during concurrent login

scenario: Verify login: read occurs during active write transaction
expected_result: System returns consistent data (no dirty reads) during concurrent login

scenario: Verify login: delete and update on same record at same time
expected_result: System one operation succeeds and the other gets conflict error during concurrent login

scenario: Verify login: rapid sequential requests from same user
expected_result: System processes in order without duplication during concurrent login

scenario: Verify login: optimistic locking violation
expected_result: System detects version mismatch and prompts user to refresh during concurrent login

expected_result: System saves progress or prompts re-authentication during login

expected_result: System resumes or rolls back gracefully during login

expected_result: System prevents duplicate submission during login
